---
title: "ps2_titanic_analysis_v2"
format: html
---


```{r libraries}
# Load necessary libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(here)
library(readr)

# Load Titanic dataset
titanic <- read_csv(here("data", "Titanic-Dataset.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
```

```{r convert-data}
# Convert categorical variables to factors
titanic$Survived <- factor(titanic$Survived, labels = c("Died", "Survived"))
titanic$Pclass <- factor(titanic$Pclass, labels = c("1st Class", "2nd Class", "3rd Class"))
```

```{r plot1}
# Violin plot: Fare distribution by Class and Survival Status
ggplot(titanic, aes(x=Pclass, y=Fare, fill=Survived)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.6, scale="width") +
  labs(title="Fare Distribution by Class and Survival Status", x="Passenger Class", y="Fare") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r plot2}
# Remove "Passenger Class" and "Survived" labels
ggplot(titanic, aes(x=Pclass, y=Fare, fill=Survived)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.6, scale="width") +
  labs(title="Fare Distribution by Class and Survival Status",y ="Fare") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = NULL)) + # Removes the title but keeps the legend
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r plot3}
# remove Pclass which defaults
ggplot(titanic, aes(x=Pclass, y=Fare, fill=Survived)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.6, scale="width") +
  labs(title="Fare Distribution by Class and Survival Status",y ="Fare") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = NULL)) + # Removes the title but keeps the legend
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())  # Ensures x-axis label is hidden
```

```{r plot4}
# remove x- and y-axis labels and fill label
ggplot(titanic, aes(x=Pclass, y=Fare, fill=Survived)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.6, scale="width") +
  labs(title="Fare Distribution by Class and Survival Status") +  # No x or y labels
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = NULL)) + # Removes the title but keeps the legend
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank())  # Removes both labels
```

```{r plot5}
# Violin plot: Fare distribution by Class and Survival Status with Dollar Formatting
ggplot(titanic, aes(x=Pclass, y=Fare, fill=Survived)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.6, scale="width") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::dollar_format()) +  # Add dollar signs to y-axis
  labs(title="Fare Distribution by Class and Survival Status on The Titanic") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = NULL)) + # Removes the title but keeps the legend
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank())  # Remove axis labels
```


```{r plot6}
#change the colors to shades of blue
ggplot(titanic, aes(x=Pclass, y=Fare, fill=Survived)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.6, scale="width") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::dollar_format()) +  # Add dollar signs to y-axis
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Died" = "#000080", "Survived" = "#ADD8E6")) +  # Navy & light blue
  labs(title="Fare Distribution by Class and Survival Status") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = NULL)) + # Removes the title but keeps the legend
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank(), # Remove axis labels
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
```

```{r plot7}
#set title to 18-point font
ggplot(titanic, aes(x=Pclass, y=Fare, fill=Survived)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.6, scale="width") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::dollar_format()) +  # Add dollar signs to y-axis
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Died" = "#000080", "Survived" = "#ADD8E6")) +  # Navy & light blue
  labs(title="Fare Distribution by Class and Survival Status") +
 guides(fill = guide_legend(title = NULL)) + # Removes the title but keeps the legend
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank(), 
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18))  # Set title to 18pt font
```

```{r plot8}
# Bold axes-tick labels and clarify title
ggplot(titanic, aes(x=Pclass, y=Fare, fill=Survived)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.6, scale="width") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::dollar_format()) +  # Add dollar signs to y-axis
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Died" = "#000080", "Survived" = "#ADD8E6")) +  # Dark & light blue
  labs(title="Fare Distribution by Class and Survival Status on The Titanic", x="Passenger Class", y="Fare") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = NULL)) + # Removes the title but keeps the legend
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank(), #blank axes
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),   # Bold x-axis tick labels
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),   # Bold y-axis tick labels
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 17)  # Bold title with 18pt font
  )
```
